Description: Snow-capped peaks of Mount Everest and the Himalayas under a cloudy sky.
The twin spires of Cologne Cathedral rising above autumn trees.
Sunset casting purple and orange hues over the Grand Canyon.
Machu Picchu ruins nestled in green mountains with mist rolling in.
The Eiffel Tower viewed from the Seine river at dusk with pink sky.
Vibrant purple and green Northern Lights over a snowy landscape.
The Empire State Building and NYC skyline bathed in golden sunset light.
Blue domes and white buildings of Santorini against a bright sky.
The faces of Mount Rushmore carved into the granite cliffside.
Traditional Japanese street with women in kimonos near Yasaka Pagoda.
